before_audit_state: Only ORD_COUNT was visible in Micro-Step 38 output.
audit_finding: Source has ORD_COUNT, ITEM_SALES_COUNT, and AOV; hiding units could misread breads/add-ons and high-quantity items.
correction_made: Added swiggy_best_match_units and swiggy_best_match_aov to the regenerated source map.
residual_risk: Ranking still prioritizes order count because final objective is high order volume; use units as secondary add-on/portion signal.
next_execution_rule: For acquisition SKUs use ORD_COUNT; for attach/add-on and bread/rice ladder use ITEM_SALES_COUNT too.

before_audit_state: Best match exposed item/price/orders but not all source dimensions.
audit_finding: DATA.xlsx includes CG_CUISINE, DISH_FAMILY, PRIMARY_CUISINE, ITEM_CATEGORY, IS_COMBO, ITEM_VEG_FLAG.
correction_made: Added these Swiggy taxonomy columns to the regenerated source map.
residual_risk: IS_COMBO is blank in source; combo detection still depends on item names/dish family.
next_execution_rule: Never let a combo/source-family row set the base price of a non-combo SKU without review.

before_audit_state: Rows had confidence/action labels but no explicit do/dont-use gate.
audit_finding: Weak, no-context, below-POS, higher-than-POS, and direct-name/price-divergent rows need different treatment before offer math.
correction_made: Added execution_mapping_gate to each POS row and tightened direct-name rows when Swiggy/Zomato prices diverge by 30%+.
residual_risk: Gate is rule-based; final operator review still needed for portal execution rows.
next_execution_rule: Only DIRECT_EQUIVALENT rows without price divergence can flow into offer layer automatically; others must be reviewed or transformed into portion/combo decisions.

before_audit_state: Could be misread as exact highest-volume price.
audit_finding: Zomato file provides OV Rank + Avg Price; Avg Price can be pulled upward by high-ticket variants.
correction_made: Kept Zomato as rank-adjusted lower-percentile price, not direct mode price.
residual_risk: No Zomato order count by item, so Zomato cannot prove absolute volume by itself.
next_execution_rule: Use Zomato rank to decide popularity/order of attack; use Swiggy order count and lower percentile to decide pay-price.

before_audit_state: Odoo stores tax-base prices while customers see gross price.
audit_finding: Direct POS price comparison can be wrong if tax is ignored.
correction_made: POS customer price estimate is computed as ex-tax price plus 5% GST.
residual_risk: Aggregator portal price may include platform-specific packaging/rounding not in Odoo.
next_execution_rule: Final portal update must compare current portal card price before changing base price.

before_audit_state: Could be treated as the source of truth for SKU universe.
audit_finding: Current platform sheets are stale/algorithm v2 support artifacts; POS is cleaner as SKU base.
correction_made: Used POS as base and platform workbook only as current-menu match context.
residual_risk: Some live portal items may exist outside POS/current workbook if operators edited portal manually.
next_execution_rule: Before final upload, capture authenticated portal evidence for pilot/high-volume rows.

before_audit_state: User warned not to use 20% as definitive.
audit_finding: Fixed-percentage reduction would flatten cluster-specific price intelligence.
correction_made: No fixed reduction is applied; price is derived from source demand, rank, similarity, and charm anchors.
residual_risk: Offer mechanics still need commission/margin math in next layer.
next_execution_rule: Compute offer/base-price split from target customer pay price, not from a universal discount percent.
